checks.name: dryRunEnabled
checks.note: dryRun is locked to true in buildWalkForwardRunConfig(). runWalkForwardObservability() throws if false.

checks.name: safeRunEnabled
checks.note: safeRun is locked to true in buildWalkForwardRunConfig(). runWalkForwardObservability() throws if false.

checks.name: noDbWrite
checks.note: Runner uses read-only injectable clients. No .create(), .upsert(), .update(), .delete() calls. Source inspection verified.

checks.name: noExternalApiCall
checks.note: No fetch(), axios., or http(s):// calls in WalkForwardObservabilityRunner.ts. Source inspection verified.

checks.name: noLlmCall
checks.note: No openai/anthropic/langchain imports. Fully deterministic. Source inspection verified.

checks.name: noStrategyMutation
checks.note: Runner reads regime context and candidate snapshots as read-only. Does not modify any strategy output.

checks.name: noProductionOverwrite
checks.note: artifactPlan restricted to outputs/backtest and outputs/system_readiness paths only.

checks.name: noForbiddenFieldsAsClaims
checks.note: Forbidden terms absent from all output field names, summaries, and conclusions. Test 14a/14b/14c verified.

checks.name: noPerformanceMetricComputation
checks.note: No forward returns, drawdowns, win-rate, or ROI computations. observabilitySummary fields are coverage counts only.

checks.name: sourceDateLeRebalanceDateEnforced
checks.note: T-05E CandidateDataAdapter enforces sourceDate <= rebalanceDate. INVALID_FUTURE_DATE status flags violations. Test 11a/11b verified.

checks.name: tradingCalendarInjected
checks.note: T-05D TaiwanTradingCalendar always used for trading date generation. calendarBasis: TAIWAN_TRADING_CALENDAR.

checks.name: regimeContextReadOnly
checks.note: T-05C RegimeContextLoader provides read-only Map<string, PersistedRegimeContext>. No regime writes.

checks.name: candidateSnapshotsReadOnly
checks.note: T-05E CandidateDataAdapter provides read-only PIT-safe CandidateSnapshot[]. No snapshot writes.

checks.name: noHardcodedTodayCap
checks.note: buildWalkForwardRunConfig() uses resolveCurrentDate(). Source inspection: no hardcoded YYYY-MM-DD dates in non-comment lines. Test 2f verified.

checks.name: artifactDirRestriction
checks.note: All artifact paths start with outputs/backtest or outputs/system_readiness. Test 13a/13b verified.

observabilityNote: Guardrail validation for T-05F WalkForward Observability Runner. All checks PASS. Not a strategy validation.
